required_skill_areas.kubernetes: Deep, hands-on experience with Kubernetes (specifically GPU-operator and device plugins) and/or SLURM for workload scheduling.
required_skill_areas.networking: Expert knowledge of InfiniBand, RoCE, and NVLink; ability to diagnose network failures that degrade collective communication (NCCL).
required_skill_areas.distributed_systems: Design and execute rigorous pre-handover test suites (NCCL, DCGM, GPU Burn) to ensure clusters are stable under the extreme stress of multi-node training.
required_skill_areas.physical_infrastructure: Profile and debug low-level bottlenecks in InfiniBand (IB) fabrics, NVLink topologies, and high-performance storage systems.
